violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of pink residue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
Public restroom toilet observed in poor repair. PIC states work order is actively in place. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
The receptacle in toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary disposals. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The floor tiles in the walk-in cooler are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2026
